statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); model_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.id'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); branch=$(cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null && git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then dirty=$(cd "$cwd" && git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || echo '*'); git_info=" | $(printf '\033[32m')⎇ $branch$dirty$(printf '\033[0m')"; else git_info=""; fi; total_input=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.total_input_tokens'); total_output=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.total_output_tokens'); if [ "$total_input" != "null" ] && [ "$total_output" != "null" ]; then case "$model_id" in *opus-4*) input_price=15; output_price=75;; *sonnet-4*) input_price=3; output_price=15;; *haiku-4*) input_price=0.8; output_price=4;; *sonnet*3-7*) input_price=3; output_price=15;; *sonnet*3-6*) input_price=3; output_price=15;; *sonnet*3-5*) input_price=3; output_price=15;; *opus*3-5*) input_price=15; output_price=75;; *haiku*3-5*) input_price=0.8; output_price=4;; *) input_price=3; output_price=15;; esac; cost=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.4f\", ($total_input / 1000000) * $input_price + ($total_output / 1000000) * $output_price}"); cost_info=" | $(printf '\033[33m')\$${cost}$(printf '\033[0m')"; else cost_info=""; fi; usage=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.current_usage'); if [ "$usage" != "null" ]; then current=$(echo "$usage" | jq '.input_tokens + .cache_creation_input_tokens + .cache_read_input_tokens'); size=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.context_window_size'); pct=$((current * 100 / size)); ctx=" | $(printf '\033[36m')$pct%$(printf '\033[0m')"; else ctx=""; fi; printf "$(printf '\033[35m')%s$(printf '\033[0m') | $(printf '\033[34m')%s$(printf '\033[0m')%s%s%s" "$model" "$dir" "$git_info" "$cost_info" "$ctx"
